g.text: # Key Distribution: Virtual Nodes Effect on Load Balance

div.p: Hash functions aren't perfectly uniform. With 1 position per node, random placement causes severe imbalance. With 150 positions, the Law of Large Numbers ensures each node's total arc length converges to 1/N of the ring.
Variance: 40% Max: 54% | Min: 8% Hotspot: Node B (6.75x overloaded)
Variance: 5% Max: 34% | Min: 33% Balanced: All nodes within 1%
